assertions.title: Preset control exposes all supported source modes

steps.observed: Login screen with 'Log in with Google' button
Google OAuth error: redirect_uri_mismatch - OAuth client not configured for http://127.0.0.1:8080

evidence.consoleErrors: none (error occurs on Google's OAuth page, outside app context)

assertions.issues: Google OAuth client ID (917526284100-huglmbdj2j45iukot3t9bqo1sls24ibo.apps.googleusercontent.com) is not configured with http://127.0.0.1:8080 as an authorized JavaScript origin or redirect URI. The redirect_uri_mismatch error prevents any authenticated UI access.

assertions.title: Preset selection is mutually exclusive
assertions.issues: Blocked by same OAuth/authentication issue as VAL-UI-SEL-001 - cannot access the preset controls without successful login

assertions.title: Preset selection persists across save and reload
assertions.issues: Blocked by same OAuth/authentication issue as VAL-UI-SEL-001 - cannot access the preset controls without successful login

assertions.title: Browser-only mode keeps ATS disabled in visible run intent
assertions.issues: Blocked by same OAuth/authentication issue as VAL-UI-SEL-001 - cannot access the preset controls or trigger runs without successful login

assertions.title: Last selection before submit is what gets submitted
assertions.issues: Blocked by same OAuth/authentication issue as VAL-UI-SEL-001 - cannot access the preset controls or trigger runs without successful login

assertions.title: Missing or legacy saved state resolves to a valid explicit preset
assertions.issues: Blocked by same OAuth/authentication issue as VAL-UI-SEL-001 - cannot access the preset controls or trigger runs without successful login. Additionally, first-visit state requires app access to verify initial preset resolution.

blockers.description: Google OAuth redirect_uri_mismatch - the OAuth client (917526284100-huglmbdj2j45iukot3t9bqo1sls24ibo.apps.googleusercontent.com) is not configured to accept http://127.0.0.1:8080 as a valid redirect URI or JavaScript origin. This blocks all authenticated UI access including the Settings > Discovery tab where preset controls exist.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted OAuth login multiple times - consistently fails with redirect_uri_mismatch. Verified OAuth client ID exists in config.js but Google Cloud Console configuration is missing http://127.0.0.1:8080.

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-UI-SEL-001 through VAL-UI-SEL-006). All 6 assertions are blocked. Root cause: Google OAuth client is not configured for http://127.0.0.1:8080, preventing any authenticated UI access. The preset controls (input[name='dpSourcePreset'] radio group with 'browser_only', 'ats_only', 'browser_plus_ats' options) are located in the authenticated Settings > Discovery UI which is inaccessible without successful OAuth login. Resolution requires adding http://127.0.0.1:8080 to the Google Cloud Console OAuth client's authorized JavaScript origins and redirect URIs.
